![Logo NeutralinoJS+NET](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c564d550-4206-4d50-91ce-de5c5a399586)

# neutralino-ext-dotnet
A .NET Extension for NeutralinoJS. This turns Neutralino into a reactive .NET GUI.
